title: Training Techniques Path
description: Build fluency in Training Techniques inside Computer Vision by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: VITS Model
steps.summary: VITS Model belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Computer Vision / Training Techniques. Compare it with Playground AI and World-Simulating VLAs. It opens into So-VITS-SVC and Vision Transformers (ViTs).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: World-Simulating VLAs
steps.summary: World-Simulating VLAs belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Computer Vision / Training Techniques. Start after World Model and World Models.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Segment Anything Model (SAM)
steps.summary: Segment Anything Model (SAM) belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Computer Vision / Training Techniques. Start after SAM. It opens into semantic segmentation with SAM (Segment Anything Model).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: SAM (Segment Anything Model)

steps.title: Playground AI

steps.title: Segment Anything Model playground
steps.summary: Segment Anything Model playground belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Training Techniques. It sits inside Computer Vision / Training Techniques. Compare it with Segment Anything Model (SAM) and SAM (Segment Anything Model).
